satisfaction_drivers: Strong positive sentiment around UI & Design
High ratings (4–5 stars) on usability praise in review text
pain_points: Recurring negative feedback on UI & Design
1-star reviews cite crashes, OTP, or slow transfers
recommendations: Prioritize fixes for UI & Design in next sprint
Invest in transfer speed and login reliability monitoring
